changes.value:
src/fetch.rs:43-81

Coverage: 42.0% (37/88 lines)

Uncovered lines: 43-78 (all validate_url branches)

```rust
pub async fn validate_url(&self, request: &WebFetchRequest) -> Result<String, FetchError>
```

Async method that delegates to SecurityValidator and maps errors. Needs tokio test for:
1. Valid URL → Ok(url_string)
2. Invalid URL → FetchError::InvalidUrl
3. Unsupported scheme (ftp://) → FetchError::InvalidUrl with protocol message
4. SSRF attempt (127.0.0.1) → FetchError::SecurityViolation
5. Other security error → FetchError::SecurityViolation
Add tests for WebFetcher validate_url security branches
